name: Mushroom Duxelles
recipeIngredient: 1 pound mushrooms, cleaned and finely chopped
1/4 cup finely chopped onion or shallots
2 garlic cloves, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large heavy frying pan over medium-low heat.
2. Add the mushrooms, onion, and garlic to the pan.
3. Cook until the moisture has cooked out and is almost a paste, about 20 to 30 minutes.
4. Add the parsley if desired.
5. Store, covered, in the refrigerator for up to a week or freeze.
Makes 2 cups
